nasb.text: But if his offering for a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord is from the flock, he shall offer it, male or female, without defect.

esv.text: “If his offering for a sacrifice of peace offering to the Lord is an animal from the flock, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish.

cnv.text: 人若是獻羊作平安祭的供物給耶和華，必須獻一隻沒有殘疾的公羊或母羊。

ccb.text: “如果用羊作祭物向耶和华献平安祭，必须献毫无残疾的公羊或母羊。
